# Sweet Dreams Music
> Fort Wayne, Indiana's premier recording studio and beat marketplace

## What We Offer
- Professional recording studio sessions (Studio A & Studio B)
- Beat store with MP3 leases, trackout leases, and exclusive rights
- Music video and media production
- Artist development tools and resources
- Mixing, mastering, and full music production services
- Band recording packages

## Studios
- Studio A: Premium recording room, $70/hour (2+ hours), $80/hour (single hour)
- Studio B: Versatile studio, $50/hour (2+ hours), $60/hour (single hour)
- 4-hour Sweet Spot deals available for both studios
- Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week

## Engineers
- PRVRB — Recording, Mixing & Mastering, Production (Studio A)
- Iszac Griner — Recording, Mixing & Mastering, Production (Studio A & B)
- Zion Tinsley — Recording, Mixing & Mastering, Production (Studio B)
- Jay Val Leo — Recording, Mixing & Mastering, Production (Studio B)

## Booking
Book sessions at sweetdreamsmusic.com/book
View pricing at sweetdreamsmusic.com/pricing
50% deposit required at booking, remainder charged after session

## Beat Store
Browse beats at sweetdreamsmusic.com/beats
Sell beats at sweetdreamsmusic.com/sell-beats
License types: MP3 Lease ($29.99), Trackout Lease ($74.99), Exclusive Rights ($400+)
Genres: Hip-Hop, Trap, R&B, Drill, Pop, Lo-Fi, Afrobeats, Soul, Jazz, and more

## Location
Fort Wayne, Indiana, United States

## Contact
Email: info@sweetdreamsmusic.com
Website: sweetdreamsmusic.com
Contact form: sweetdreamsmusic.com/contact
